reason: Browser use feature successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title, and reported "Example Domain" in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface showing three agents in the sidebar.
Found and clicked on agent "QA-20260502-184054-7vv8" in the sidebar — Agent opened successfully in the main content area with chat interface ready.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field — Message entered correctly in the textbox.
Clicked the Send message button — Message sent successfully and agent began processing.
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed work in approximately 6 seconds, displaying live browser preview of the page and returning results.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly displays: "The page title is Example Domain." with matching text visible in the browser preview on the right side. Tool calls show both "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Browser Command $ get title" were executed successfully.
